set(HB_BUILD_SUBSET OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(HB_BUILD_UTILS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(SKIP_INSTALL_ALL ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)

FetchContent_Declare(
  harfbuzz
  GIT_REPOSITORY  https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzz.git
  GIT_TAG         13.1.1
  GIT_SHALLOW     TRUE
  GIT_PROGRESS    TRUE
)

set(QADRA_HARFBUZZ_OLD_AUTOMOC ${CMAKE_AUTOMOC})
set(QADRA_HARFBUZZ_OLD_AUTOUIC ${CMAKE_AUTOUIC})
set(QADRA_HARFBUZZ_OLD_AUTORCC ${CMAKE_AUTORCC})

set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC OFF)
set(CMAKE_AUTOUIC OFF)
set(CMAKE_AUTORCC OFF)

FetchContent_MakeAvailable(harfbuzz)

set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC ${QADRA_HARFBUZZ_OLD_AUTOMOC})
set(CMAKE_AUTOUIC ${QADRA_HARFBUZZ_OLD_AUTOUIC})
set(CMAKE_AUTORCC ${QADRA_HARFBUZZ_OLD_AUTORCC})
